headline: Snap-on Incorporated to Webcast 2026 First Quarter Results Conference Call
summary: KENOSHA, Wis., April 09, 2026--Snap-on will release 2026 first quarter results prior to market open on April 23, 2026, with a call discussing the results to follow at 10:00 a.m. ET.
